is.t: SDR CMSO | End User Digital Services | Powered by VBA + ITMS Data

c.f: IFERROR(COUNTIFS('All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!L:L,">0",'All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!L:L,"<=3"),0)
IFERROR(COUNTIFS('All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!L:L,">3",'All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!L:L,"<=7"),0)
IFERROR(COUNTIFS('All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!L:L,">7",'All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!L:L,"<=14"),0)
IFERROR(SUMPRODUCT((COUNTIF(VIP_Current!B:B,'All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!A2:A2000)>0)*('All Quarantined Workstations Mi'!A2:A2000<>"")),0)

is.t: ACTIONS — Run RebuildAllButtons macro to activate buttons below
